patches.summary: Use Follow Up Boss Basic API-key auth, prefer stored OAuth bearer tokens, and add X-System headers.
patches.reason: Follow Up Boss requires Basic base64(api_key + ':') for API keys and supports optional integration headers.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... covers Basic auth, bearer preference, and system header behavior.

patches.summary: Add auth oauth-url, auth oauth-token, and auth oauth-refresh commands.
patches.reason: Follow Up Boss OAuth needs form token exchange with HTTP Basic client authentication and token storage without printing raw token values.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... covers authorization URL generation and token exchange output redaction.

patches.summary: Add agent-crm local CRM reasoning commands for agenda, triage, next actions, gaps, quality, and context packs.
patches.reason: The public CLI needs agent-native CRM workflows beyond generated endpoint wrappers, using the local SQLite store as evidence.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... covers empty-store and fixture-backed agent-crm output shape.
